onboarding.step1_body: Take a photo of your latest dictation or math exercise.
onboarding.step2_body: Mimi reviews your work and shows you exactly where you went wrong.
onboarding.step3_body: Do 3 short targeted exercises. Tomorrow, you're ready.

scan.title: Scan a copy
scan.instruction: Place your sheet flat, well lit.

paywall.title: No more free scans
paywall.subtitle: You've used your 3 discovery scans. Pick a ticket to keep going.
paywall.ticket_monthly_hint: 1,500 KMF per child · 120 scans/month · weekly in-app report
